name: Fruit Diamonds
recipeIngredient: 1 8 oz. pkg. Pillsbury quick crescent rolls
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F.
Unroll dough and place on waxed paper (do not separate the rolls!). Press all seams together.
Place another piece of waxed paper over top; roll out into a 16-inch x 12-inch rectangle.
Remove wax paper and cut dough into 12 squares, each measuring 4 inches x 4 inches.
Place 1 tablespoon of jam or conserve in the center of each square.
Fold two opposite corners into the middle (only bring two corners into the middle so it looks like a canoli).
Sprinkle with sugar.
Bake on an ungreased cookie sheet for 8 to 12 minutes. Can be done the night before and warmed for breakfast.
